critical.risk: Government tax debt - penalties and interest accumulating daily
critical.action: Pay immediately via IRD myIR portal
Add A record 76.76.21.21 at GoDaddy - apex domain still pointing to Squarespace
critical.impact: junctionmedia.ai (without www) is broken - only www works

critical.details: 47+ commits not synced to origin/main. Windows GCM requires interactive browser auth.
critical.action: Run `git push` in Junction project folder or auth via browser

high.action: Update payment method - account at risk of suspension

high.details: Shopify $39/mo blocked by payment crisis. Workaround: start free 3-day trial to film Ep 1 NOW.
high.action: Use free trial to film content immediately

needs_input.action: Confirm accuracy or provide correct figure
Provide quote (with client permission) to replace current placeholder

needs_input.details: YouTube upload not confirmed, Zach extras handles not received, vertical exports pending

ideas_and_improvements.idea: Film Ep 1 Build-in-Public TODAY using Shopify free 3-day trial + screen recording a Claude convo. Raw origin content outperforms polished. Can start building audience BEFORE store is live.

Junction is now a fully coherent personal brand. The #1 unlock is resolving the GoDaddy DNS + Git push tonight. Once done, the site is genuinely launch-ready. Then focus shifts to getting 3 real case studies/testimonials.

Payment crisis is now Day 9. IRD is the most urgent - resolve tonight. Create a Wise recurring transfer or payment method failsafe so subscriptions never cascade again. One payment card with buffer = no more disruption.
Tom's LinkedIn and X presence needs content. Junction site links to these but they appear dormant. Even 1 post per day about the Junction + ALTERNATE journey creates social proof that feeds the site.

Real DBH case study is the #1 trust signal missing from the site. Stats exist (30%+ sales lift). Getting a 1-2 sentence client quote would unlock the testimonial section and make 'Apply' CTAs far more credible.

tomorrows_priorities: 2. GoDaddy DNS fix + git push - Junction site fully live in 10 mins
3. Film ALTERNATE Ep 1 using Shopify free trial (today or tomorrow)
4. Confirm LinkedIn/X handles + 15yr experience stat for Junction
5. DBH testimonial quote - ask this week
6. Start posting on LinkedIn/X to bring Junction site to life

collaboration_rating.notes: Exceptional autonomous work day. Junction Agent shipped 7+ production deploys without Tom. ALTERNATE Agent completed full 5-episode content series during blocking period - turned idle time into major asset. Personal Agent tracked all blockers silently during DBH hours, no unnecessary interruptions. All agents respected DBH hours boundary. Key improvement: agents are now generating real deliverables during blocking time instead of just logging status.
highlights: Junction V2 shipped entirely autonomously - Tom woke to a transformed site
ALTERNATE turned payment crisis downtime into complete content library
Zero unnecessary Tom pings during DBH hours
Coordinated blocker list ready for 6pm post-DBH

lessons_learned.lesson: Blocking time = prep time. When primary execution is blocked, agents should generate parallel deliverables. ALTERNATE completed 5 scripts + logo brief while waiting on Shopify payment.
Ship fast, iterate fast. Junction Agent deployed 7+ times in one day, each build under 40 seconds. Zero ceremony = high throughput.
Personal brand copy requires first-person audit. 'We/Us/Our' language persisted from the agency version and required dedicated pass. Future: check all copy for voice consistency when repositioning.
Payment cascades are a systemic risk. Day 9 of payment crisis affecting IRD, Figma, Miro, Shopify. One card with a buffer = prevents domino effect on all projects.
Free trials unlock content before paid launch. Shopify 3-day trial means Tom can film Ep 1 raw content NOW, ahead of paid store. Same principle applies to other tools.
